_comment: The removed top hint bar plus the info panel's viewport clamp: a lone Cavalry regiment (drill mode, no opponent -- cavalry carries the tallest stat sheet, with the mount row) is selected and sits under the bottom-left panel. The top-left of the screen, where the always-on controls hint line used to render, is now clean; the Shortcuts overlay (? or Menu -> Shortcuts) remains the controls reference. The clamp itself only binds when the expanded sheet overflows a short window (the expand is a HUD button click the scripted-input recorder cannot drive), so the clamped, scrolling state is shown as a still in the PR description instead. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
